Comment.value: Called from the button Move in move layout. Button Move is only enabled for the allowed moves within FAT
Most variables used in this script are global and set by script Start Move FAT item
moveto_item = PrimaryKey of the Package, Chapter or Page that we will move our item
moveto_item_level = the hierarchial level if the new item

Package types: 4C393C7E-B339-4BFA-ADE7-E59F47FBAC60 - Scroll 5F127BA8-1BC7-467B-93EF-7BE401615BAA - Slide 4B8AB81A-9C99-43AD-8C32-3325D98F688A - Mixed type BB6DDA20-C6CE-441E-B99C-CE1F884DC7E5 - Site old B6397ED6-1BA8-4444-BD51-65076EE684F9 - Site C69777FA-7286-422C-9337-B722B10663B6 - Title info
First check if the package types corresponds - otherwise exit This shpuld already be handled by the visibility of the Move button

Calculation.Text: "You cannot move items between different types of packages. "

Comment.value: If OK start with type of item
A chapter can have a Package or a Title as a parent
Perform for both Title and Package
Check if the chapter is moved to a new package - then update all Text and Media
A page can have a chapter, package or a title as a parent
Check if the page is moved to a new package - then update all Text and Media
Check if the page item is moved to a new package - then update all Text and Media

Calculation.Text: "The " & $$fat_item_type & " was successfully moved to a new location. Do you want to go to the new location, the old location or the top of Title?"
